content.text:
commit 7765d6d382c8f2c505c0ad6751ddd04f96ed92c5
Author: zacmero <z4cmero@gmail.com>
Date:   Sat Apr 25 19:20:48 2026 -0300

    Pi Agent Conversations Saved and Loaded in Vault
    
    Every time you run pi agent within this vault, the agent will now
    automatically log your entire conversation history to
    /agent/conversations/
     when the session ends or you exit the app.
    
     Here is what I did:
     1. I created a new local extension file at
    .pi/agent/extensions/auto-log-conversations.ts in your vault. pi
    automatically discovers and loads
     extensions placed in this folder.
     2. The extension listens for the session_shutdown event (which fires
    when you close pi or switch sessions).
     3. It extracts all the User and Assistant messages from the current
    conversation tree.
     4. It creates the agent/conversations/ directory if it doesn't already
    exist.
     5. It saves the entire conversation as a beautifully formatted Markdown
    file, named using the date and your session's name (e.g.,
     2026-04-25-My-Session.md).

 .pi/agent/extensions/auto-log-conversations.ts |  98 ++++++++
 AGENTS.md                                      | 305 +++++++++++++++++++++++++
 obsidian-config-mobile/workspace-mobile.json   |  36 ++-
 obsidian-config/workspace.json                 |  55 ++---
 4 files changed, 445 insertions(+), 49 deletions(-)
